Video.summary: A wise master is called upon to heal a painfully misguided cyberbully and his tragic victim
Video.title: The Principle

Video.summary: Admissions tells a transformational tale about what it takes to find lasting peace.
Video.title: Admissions

Video.summary: Infertility isn’t just a woman’s problem. Plus, nine exercises that can make your sexy sweat session even better.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Sexercise: Exercises That Can Improve Your Sex Life

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Sexercise: Exercises That Can Improve Your Sex Life
Sex Talk - Sexercise: Exercises That Can Improve Your Sex Life
Sex Talk - Sexercise: Exercises That Can Improve Your Sex Life

Video.summary: We discuss how new parents can fuel their love life. Plus, ways to get more creative during foreplay. These topics and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Getting Creative During Foreplay

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Getting Creative During Foreplay
Sex Talk - Getting Creative During Foreplay
Sex Talk - Getting Creative During Foreplay

Video.summary: Founder, Glenn Marsden, of Imperfectly Perfect Campaign, and Jeremy Jackson, former Baywatch star share their personal journeys with body dysmorphia and how it led to a worldwide campaign. A young man faces his fears and a tale of kindness at 30,000 ft.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect

Video.summary: Laura Di Franco, CEO of Brave Healer Productions, discusses brave healing and the power of sharing our stories. And, meet Oyen the ginger cat and adorable kids from India, along with Daaji redefining meditation for a joyful heart.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing
Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing
Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Gregory Jantz, Ph.D., psychologist and founder of The Center: A Place of Hope, which was voted one of the top 10 facilities in the United States for the treatment of depression. He discusses how even when we feel stress, anxious, or hopeless, there are ways to feel better. He talks about the importance of getting bloodwork and regulating vitamins and hormones, which can be done using natural methods.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Dr. Gregory Jantz - Hope for Anxiety & Depression

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Dr. Gregory Jantz - Hope for Anxiety & Depression
The Aware Show: Dr. Gregory Jantz - Hope for Anxiety & Depression
The Aware Show: Dr. Gregory Jantz - Hope for Anxiety & Depression

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Wendie Colter, MCWC, CMIP, a Certified Medical Intuitive, Master Certified Wellness Coach, and founder/CEO of The Practical Path, Inc. She is an author and has studied various energy healing methodologies. She was curious as to why some people heal, and why others have a more challenging time. Her new book is Essentials of Medical Intuition: A Visionary Path to Wellness.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Wendie Colter - Medical Intuition

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Wendie Colter - Medical Intuition
The Aware Show: Wendie Colter - Medical Intuition
The Aware Show: Wendie Colter - Medical Intuition

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Chris Wark, author and health coach, who was just 26 years old when doctors discovered a golf-ball size tumor in his colon. After surgery, Chris decided that he would go against his oncologist’s advice and not take part in chemotherapy or radiation. After deep prayer and consideration, he decided that he would radically change his diet and explore natural healing modalities, which worked! His book is Chris Beat Cancer.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Chris Wark - How to Beat Cancer and Stay Healthy

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Chris Wark - How to Beat Cancer and Stay Healthy
The Aware Show: Chris Wark - How to Beat Cancer and Stay Healthy
The Aware Show: Chris Wark - How to Beat Cancer and Stay Healthy

Video.summary: Lisa Garr talks with Nina Boski, host of the podcast Behind the Icon, which explores Marilyn Monroe’s life & the circumstances around her passing. Decades after her death, she is still considered one of the most popular icons in Hollywood history.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Marilyn Monroe: Behind the Icon

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Marilyn Monroe: Behind the Icon
The Aware Show - Marilyn Monroe: Behind the Icon
The Aware Show - Marilyn Monroe: Behind the Icon

Video.summary: Suffering has deep social causes. In this lesson, Dr. Maté explains how your physiology is impacted by stress and social determinants.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering
A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering
A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering

Video.summary: Addiction is neither a choice you make or an unavoidable disease. It’s an attempt to solve a problem. The conundrum is… it almost works.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction
A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction
A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction

Video.summary: Expressions of healthy anger are different from unhealthy anger. Dr. Maté articulates the difference and discusses the increased health risks when healthy anger is repressed.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?
A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?
A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?

Video.summary: What is the meaning of health? In this lesson, you’ll learn what health looks like and how to approach healing with compassionate inquiry and healthy disillusionment.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?
A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?
A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?

Video.summary: Legendary Hip Hop artist Kurtis Blow talks about his humble beginnings. He speaks about his career in Hip Hop and how he is continuing to help others as he follows his passion.
Video.title: LSWMH - Kurtis Blow

Video.summary: Charis Michelsen talks about her experience in modeling and acting. Charis also shares some exciting news about her newest projects.
Video.title: LSWMH - Charis Michelsen

Video.summary: Rock & Roll Hall of Fame Inductees, Rod Argent and Colin Blunstone of The Zombies, are today's guests on Life Stories with Marc Hoberman. Rod and Colin talk about their 50 plus years in Rock and Roll as well as their new album. The Legends who are famous for Time of the Season, She's Not There, and many more also offer sage advice for young, aspiring musicians.
Video.title: LSWMH - Rod Argent & Colin Blunstone of The Zombies

Image.alt: LSWMH - Rod Argent & Colin Blunstone of The Zombies
LSWMH - Rod Argent & Colin Blunstone of The Zombies
LSWMH - Rod Argent & Colin Blunstone of The Zombies

Video.summary: American Ninja Warrior Champion Daniel Gil talks about training, competition, homeschooling, and more.
Video.title: LSWMH - Daniel Gil

Video.summary: Radio icon and Radio Hall of Fame Inductee Shadoe Stevens is our guest on Life Stories with Marc Hoberman. Stevens talks about the obstacles he had to overcome in order to succeed in radio. He also talks about his children's book and the passion and drive needed to be successful. He credits FAILURE as the driving force of his success!
Video.title: LSWMH - Shadoe Stevens

Video.summary: Day 6 of Teaching the Teachers reminds us that our worth comes from God, not success or recognition. True stature comes from grounding in what’s real, not clicks or followers. Teaching and service require integrity, generosity, and deep preparation—giving fully whether paid or not.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 6

Video.summary: Day 7 of Teaching the Teachers addresses money, creativity, and service without guilt. Charging fairly is not unspiritual, and true integrity means showing up fully regardless of audience. Mastery comes through patience and practice, while real success flows from serving others for the right reasons.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 7

Video.summary: Day 8 of Teaching the Teachers explores finding your authentic voice through service, humility, and receptivity. True power comes from emptying the ego, speaking on behalf of others, and showing up with spiritual impeccability. Teaching requires presence, strength, and keeping the focus on those you serve.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 8

Video.summary: Day 9 of Teaching the Teachers emphasizes that every relationship is purposeful and offers an opportunity for growth. From brief encounters to lifelong assignments, relationships train us in love, grace, and righteous living. Even when physical proximity ends, the learning of the relationship remains.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 9

Video.summary: Day 10 of teaching the Teachers challenges spiritual bypassing in social and political life. True spirituality does not avoid suffering but responds with love rather than fear. Adults are called to rethink inherited dogma, discern truth from distortion, and engage the world from higher consciousness.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 10

Video.summary: DR. YALE SAMOLE - Supplements for Heart Health DR. WALTER F. LAMBERT & GRACIELA JIMENEZ - Child Abuse DR. MICHELLE WEINER - CBD for Pain
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E30

Video.summary: LOIS EXELBERT - Dawn Phenomenon DR. STELLA KOCOVIC VILLACORTA - Vaccines and Screenings CARLA DUENAS - Healthy Eating and Pregnancy
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E31

Video.summary: ANGIE PLACERES & TERRY OCHOA - Green Kitchen DR. YEISEL BARQUIN - Heart Disease and Diabetes LUCETTE TALAMAS & NICOLE RODRIGUEZ - Nutrition and Mental Health
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E32

Video.summary: DR. JONATHAN GOTTLIEB - Back Pain NICOLE RODRIGUEZ & LUCETTE TALAMAS - Mindful Eating DR. JUAN CARLOS PEREDA - Aneurysms
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E33

Video.summary: DR. JOSE MENA - Tech Neck and Growing Horns MIREN OCA - Swim Safety DR. ALVARO GOMEZ - Cancer and Heart Disease
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E34

Video.summary: For day 21 of our challenge we will explore this concept through the restorative Pigeon Pose.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 21 Unity Pigeon

Video.summary: Today's posture is Bakasana, a powerful arm balance that will help you find that energy in the arms, the core and the entire body.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 22 Energy Bakasana

Video.summary: The team, led by Anand, prepare for their motorcycle adventure to the four sacred peaks. The first practice ride is here in the birthplace of yoga, but it is not encouraging as monsoons are destroying roads and villages, Fred seems a liability and Ryan's seizures could be an issue.
Video.title: Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh

Image.alt: Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh
Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh
Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh

Video.summary: Jen and Jeff’s dream is to save their marriage on this journey, but it’s clear they are in different mindsets from the beginning. We are reminded that Anand himself had a prophecy of death and his teachers and life adventures helped guide him to freedom. Heading towards Kedarnath, night’s darkness sets in and Ryan sees someone Flip over their handlebars…
Video.title: Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night

Image.alt: Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night
Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night
Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night

Video.summary: Our first glimpse of the first peak, Kedarnath, the temple of death. Anand reminds us that What needs to die is part of the ego, fears, and comforts. Ken thinks people are riding recklessly, Mario takes his first spill, injuring his passenger Aizhan. Jeff ‘s comments further alienate Jen, but motivate her to rise up to greatness…
Video.title: Death of Ego at Kedarnath

Video.summary: Emptiness and Power in the Gap. The stunning Tungnath Peak at 13,000 ft, the Feminine Temple above the Masculine. Ken goes from rational doubter to having an experience beyond understanding that relates to his deceased sister. Unfortunately, the experience is tainted by ignorance and the seemingly inspiring day is further marred when Anna has an accident…
Video.title: Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath

Image.alt: Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath
Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath
Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath
